utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding items. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: The format requires each of the first four to be insurance/service with costs; the plan provides a plan/service name and a cost for each. For total_budget, the format requires a complete monthly/annual cost breakdown; the plan only provides a total_monthly_cost and no annual breakdown, so it is not fully specified. Therefore, 4 items are fully specified, and 1 is not.
